manifest.title: Headscale
manifest.author: Headscale authors
manifest.description: Headscale is an open source, self-hosted implementation of the Tailscale control server. This Cloudron package runs Headscale with SQLite storage, an optional embedded DERP STUN UDP port, and a bundled web UI protected by Cloudron proxy auth.
manifest.postInstallMessage: Headscale is ready. Open the Configure link to access the bundled web UI at /web. Create a Headscale user, generate a pre-auth key, then connect Tailscale clients with this app URL as the login server. The DERP STUN UDP port is optional and DERP is disabled by default in the generated config.
manifest.changelog: - Polish Device View grouped user cards with lighter nested rows and clearer collapse controls.

DERP_PORT.title: DERP STUN Port
DERP_PORT.description: UDP port for embedded DERP STUN (optional)
